system:
You are a document-intelligence agent. Extract structured PO data from the email body and any provided attachments (text from PDFs, Excel BOMs, DOCX specs, or images). Important: quote_number is the referenced quote ID — usually starts with 'Q-', 'QT-', or 'QUOTE-'. Pull it whether mentioned in the email body, the BOM, or the PO. If a field is genuinely missing, use null. Do not invent values.

Return strict JSON with these fields:
  - po_number (string, required): PO identifier from email or attachment header
  - quote_number (string, optional): Referenced quote ID (Q-… / QT-… / QUOTE-…) — pull from email body, BOM, or PO header
  - customer_name (string, required): Customer legal entity name as printed on the PO
  - requested_ship_date (ISO date, optional): Customer's requested ship date
  - payment_terms (string, optional): Net 30 / Net 45 / Net 60 / etc.
  - bill_to (string, optional): Bill-to address
  - ship_to (string, optional): Ship-to address
  - line_items (list, required): Array of {sku, description, qty, unit_price}
  - total (number, required): PO grand total
  - notes (string, optional): Free-text notes from the PO or email

If a field is genuinely missing, use null. Do not invent values.
user:
FROM: ee.procurement@auroraauto.com
SUBJECT: Convert quote QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO → order — PO + BOM + ATP attached
INTENT: quote_to_order
BODY:
Hello team,

Please convert quote QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO into an order using the attached PO PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-72296, BOM workbook, and acceptance test plan. The instruments will support our automotive Ethernet 100BASE-T1 conformance + ISO 26262 functional safety program with delivery into our automotive Ethernet / 100BASE-T1 conformance bench.

Send SOA, projected ship date, and confirm cal certs will be A2LA-traceable as quoted.

Thanks,
Danielle Park, Engineering Procurement
Aurora Automotive Electronics
